title: Engineer
description: Engineer datapack 1.20.5 and more is a datapack designed to add new mechanics for automation and mechanics. It adds an automatic block breaker, an end hopper, "block to block" (allows you to transform blocks) and other things.
body:
# Engineer datapack and more (EN)

“Engineer datapack 1.20.5 and more is a datapack designed to add new mechanics for automation and mechanics.

## 1) The end hopper

The end hopper isn't a hopper like the others - in fact, it's not even a hopper at all, because it has to be placed ON a hopper to function, and TP has to be placed on every item within 5 blocks of it. To remove it, just break the hopper it's on.

### CRAFT:
- 4 ender pearl
- 4 hopper
- 1 crafter

![Craft end hopper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b873947c5be2dde192c9744c8831e998399dab6c.png)

## 2) Oxidizing

The oxidizer is designed for buildeur who need to oxidize copper.
To use it, simply place a normal copper block on top, and after 3 seconds it will be fully oxidized.

### CRAFT:
- 4 Copper bulbs (2 oxidized)
- 4 Water lanterns
- 1 Crafteur

![craft oxyder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b6cc0baf6a4f251232f1f8acc1dbfabf2264994.png)

## 3) The block breaker

The block breaker has a special function because it breaks ALL the blocks on its north face, dropping everything dropped by a diamond spur.

### CRAFT:
- 8 iron pick
- 1 Crafter

![Craft block breaker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3421fee8bc01a6c32c368b6cc4210e5524bd3b18.png)

## 4) Iron farm
the iron farm creates an iron lingo every 2 to 4 minutes and makes it appear inside the block.

### CRAFT:
- 4 emeralds
- 2 fabricators
- 2 rose
- 1 spawner

![iron farm craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d51b98babd537b94ffec61b2e7ccbb1df2d629c9.png)

## “bloc” to “bloc

The “bloc” to “bloc” transforms the block on the north face into another block on the south face.
Here are the different “bloc” to “bloc” :
- cobblestone to stone (transforms stone into “roche”)
- stone to granite
- stone to diorite
- stone to andesite

### CRAFT:

(block “1” is the one to be transformed and block “2” is the one to be transformed into)

- 4 redstone
- 2 comparators
- 1 fabricator
- 1 block “1
- 1 block “2

![bloc to bloc craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eb6b4be2d87a2aaa97a4caff56c3883b2170876.png)

# 
# 
#

# Engineer datapack 1.20.5 and more (FR)

"Engineer datapack 1.20.5 and more" est un datapack fais pour rajouter des nouvelles mécanique pour l'automatisation et la mécanique.

## 1) L'end hopper (entonoir de l'end)

L'end hopper n'est pas un Entonoir (hopper) comme les autre, pour tout dire il ne fais même pas entonoir (hopper) car il doit être place SUR un entonoir (hopper) pour fonctionner et TP tout les item à moin de 5 blocks à lui. Pour l'enlever il sufis de casser le hopper sur le quel il est.

### CRAFT:
- 4 ender pearl
- 4 hopper
- 1 crafter

![Craft end hopper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b873947c5be2dde192c9744c8831e998399dab6c.png)

## 2) L'oxyder

L'oxyder est fais pour les buildeur qui on besois de cuivre oxyder.
Pour s'en servir il sufis de poser un bloc de cuivre normal desus et au bous 3 segondes il set totalement oxyder.

### CRAFT:
- 4 Ampoule en cuivre (dont 2 oxyder)
- 4 Lanterne aquatique
- 1 Crafteur

![craft oxyder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b6cc0baf6a4f251232f1f8acc1dbfabf2264994.png)

## 3) Le block breaker

Le block breaker as un fonctionement particulier car il casse TOUT les blocks qui sont à sa face nordet drop tous se que drop une éper en diamand.

### CRAFT:
- 8 pioche en fer
- 1 Crafter

![Craft block breaker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3421fee8bc01a6c32c368b6cc4210e5524bd3b18.png)

## 4) La farm à fer
la farm à fer crée un lingo de fer toutes les 2 à 4 minutes et le fais apparaitre à l'interieur du bloc

### CRAFT:
- 4 émeraudes
- 2 fabricateurs
- 2 rose
- 1 spawner

![iron farm craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d51b98babd537b94ffec61b2e7ccbb1df2d629c9.png)

##  "bloc" to "bloc"

Le "bloc" to "bloc" permet de transformer le bloc de sa face nord en un autre bloc à la face sud.
Voici les diférent "bloc" to "bloc" :
- cobblestone to stone (transforme la pierre en "roche")
- stone to granite
- stone to diorite
- stone to andesite

### CRAFT:

(le bloc "1" est selui qui doit être transformer et le 2 selui en quoi il doit être transformer)

- 4 redstone
- 2 comparateurs
- 1 fabricateur
- 1 bloc "1"
- 1 bloc "2"

![bloc to bloc craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eb6b4be2d87a2aaa97a4caff56c3883b2170876.png)
